basic_scene.title: Test Scene
basic_scene.description: A test scene for context_history tests

archived_history.text: The party arrived at the ancient ruins.
They discovered a hidden chamber beneath the temple.
A mysterious figure emerged from the shadows.
The confrontation revealed secrets about the ancient prophecy.
The group decided to seek guidance from the Oracle.

static_archived_history.text: Long ago, the kingdom was at peace.

layer_0.text: Chapter One: The party formed and began their quest.
Chapter Two: They faced their first challenge at the ruins.

layer_1.text: The first arc of the adventure saw the heroes unite and discover the threat.

character.message: Elena: Hello there, traveler. What brings you to these parts?
Marcus: I seek the lost artifact of the ancients.
Elena: The artifact? That's a dangerous quest indeed.
Marcus: I'm prepared for any danger.
Elena: Very well. I shall guide you to the temple.

narrator.message: The sun began to set over the ancient forest.
A cool breeze rustled through the leaves.

director.message: Express determination to find the artifact

reinforcement.message: Elena is secretly worried about the prophecy.
reinforcement.question: motivation

context_investigation.message: Elena has flowing silver hair and wears a green cloak.
The forest clearing is bathed in golden light.
